text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning during Tracen's summer camp, I notice Mejiro Ryan
walking toward me, stretching her arms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! Looking forward to another great workout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, my engines are rearing to go! Your training might have
something to do with that. Ah, right, the morning meeting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One after the other, trainees congregate in the lobby of the camp
dorm. The head trainer then steps forward.

text_block_list.name: Head Trainer
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the halfway point of the summer camp, and I'm sure
you're starting to feel the effects of your training. No doubt you want
to test out your new skills.

text_block_list.name: Head Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Which is why we're holding scrimmages on the last day of the camp! If
you're interested, let your trainers know, and they will apply in your
stead!

text_block_list.name: Head Trainer
text_block_list.text: At the moment, we already have one participant... Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait, you're telling me I could race against Oguri?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I've had my eyes on Oguri ever since she transferred to this
school.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't have a fancy family name supporting her. She gets by on
pure talent... She's the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... can you sign me up for the scrimmages? I want to race
Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'll show her everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which... we better come up with a workout routine if we
wanna beat Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's acceleration at the end of the race is her secret weapon. She's
a late surger, just like me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But is it a good idea to stick to the same strategy here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Two strategies immediately come to mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We could refine our current strategy and face Oguri Cap head-on.
Or... we could surprise her with a pace chaser strategy and try to get
ahead of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I relay these options to Mejiro Ryan and tell her the choice is hers.
After pondering for a while, she raises her head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I want to try the pace chaser strategy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Normally, I'd want to face her head-on—make it a battle of the
surgers. But I want to expand my horizons and try something new!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are full of conviction—even more so than usual. I can easily
tell how badly she wants to win this.
choice_data_list: All right, then pace chaser training it is!
All right, then pace chaser training it is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Since our strategy requires keeping a steady pace over a long period,
we need to work on my stamina!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A teensy bit of stamina training ain't gonna take me down! Come on,
muscles, lemme hear you cry out! Your pain, my gain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze...
choice_data_list: All right, let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We don't have much time, but we should be—huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, a sudden gust of wind hits the two of us. In that moment, I
see a white blur out of the corner of my eye...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wait... Was that Oguri?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm sure of it! I'd never miss that silvery hair of hers! That
sprint... She must be training like crazy too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Good. I wouldn't wanna fight Oguri if she wasn't gonna give it her
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved by Oguri Cap's determination, Mejiro Ryan softly smiles. As I
stand by her side, I notice a few trainees gossiping behind us.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey... Was that Oguri? I thought she was in a slump...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I bet that's why she's training so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A slump... Sounds like the pace chaser strategy was the right choice.
We can definitely catch her off guard at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It was just for a moment, but I caught a glimpse of Oguri's face when
she ran by. She looked so determined. No way could you call that a
slump.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When you're prepping for a big race, you've gotta believe you can do
it. Otherwise, there's no way you could run like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Believing in yourself... In that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the scrimmage arrives, and from what I can tell, Oguri Cap
is in tip-top shape, just like Mejiro Ryan predicted.

text_block_list.name: Head Trainer
text_block_list.text: All right, racers, get into position. Ready, set... go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oguri, I've always looked up to you, but now... I'm gonna surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's in a great position! Ah, but so is Ryan! Ohhh... I can't wait to
see the final dash for the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is me... This is how Mejiro Ryan runs!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's pulled ahead, but Ryan's not far behind! They're doing it!
They're facing each other head-on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They're neck and neck! Who will win?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Rats. Thought I had her there, but she beat me good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for changing our strategy midway through... Seeing Oguri take
her training so seriously made me want to take her on as a surger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You bet! That race was so intense! If I had just been a liiiittle bit
faster, I bet I could've won!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm disappointed, sure, but I'm not sad at all. If anything, I'm proud of
myself for doing things my way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I want to get stronger—strong enough that I won't lose to Oguri Cap
or Mejiro McQueen ever again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Will you... help me get there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan shows me the brightest smile I've ever seen. In that
moment, my conviction to make her dreams come true grows even
stronger.
